betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Energy Acceptor converts external power (RF/FE) into AE power for the network. It is the primary power input for any AE2 system.

Accepts power from any side and distributes it across the connected cable network. Multiple Energy Acceptors can be placed on the same network for higher power throughput.

Craft with:
2× Iron Ingot + 2× Fluix Crystal + 1× Charged Certus Quartz Crystal

Tip: Place the Energy Acceptor directly on a cable, not on a machine. It must be part of the cable network to function.
